entity.summary: Active decentralized spot and perpetual exchange protocol operating across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Botanix, and MegaETH. A July 2025 vulnerability affected GMX v1 / GLP on Arbitrum, but official governance materials said GMX v2 was unaffected; v1 trading and new GLP liquidity were later phased out while the current protocol continued.
entity.notes: Retain active. The 2025 incident was confined to the legacy v1 / GLP deployment. Current official documentation describes live GMX trading and liquidity products, while archived documentation marks v1 trading and GLP issuance as phased out. Existing exploit events are not duplicated.

expected.summary: Decentralized perpetual exchange protocol. In July 2025, GMX v1 / GLP on Arbitrum was exploited for about USD 42 million, leading to disabled v1 trading and GLP mint/redeem on Arbitrum and Avalanche while GMX v2 and the broader protocol continued.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The exploit affected GMX v1 / GLP and triggered temporary v1/GLP disablement, while GMX v2 was reported as unaffected and the broader protocol continued.

changes.summary: Active decentralized spot and perpetual exchange protocol operating across Arbitrum, Avalanche, Botanix, and MegaETH. A July 2025 vulnerability affected GMX v1 / GLP on Arbitrum, but official governance materials said GMX v2 was unaffected; v1 trading and new GLP liquidity were later phased out while the current protocol continued.
changes.notes: Retain active. The 2025 incident was confined to the legacy v1 / GLP deployment. Current official documentation describes live GMX trading and liquidity products, while archived documentation marks v1 trading and GLP issuance as phased out. Existing exploit events are not duplicated.

evidence.title: GMX protocol introduction
evidence.notes: Current official documentation describes active spot and perpetual trading, liquidity pools, governance, APIs, and supported networks.

evidence.title: Trading on V1
evidence.notes: Official archived documentation states that GMX v1 trading has been phased out since July 2025 and directs users to the current protocol.

evidence.title: Resolve the Distribution Plan for the Recovered Funds from Arbitrum GLP
evidence.notes: Official governance discussion states that the July 2025 vulnerability affected GMX v1 on Arbitrum and that GMX v2 remained unaffected with trading and liquidity provision continuing.
